nasb.text: If, however, it is any unclean animal of the kind which men do not present as an offering to the Lord, then he shall place the animal before the priest.

esv.text: And if it is any unclean animal that may not be offered as an offering to the Lord, then he shall stand the animal before the priest,

cnv.text: 所許的若是不潔淨的牲畜，人不能把牠獻給耶和華為供物，就要把牲畜牽到祭司面前；

ccb.text: 如果许愿献的是不洁净的牲畜，即不能献给耶和华作供物的牲畜，那人就要把牲畜带到祭司面前，
